subtitle.en: Recover the Time Core before the school collapses into a time loop.
subtitle.es: Recupera el Nucleo del Tiempo antes de que la escuela colapse en un bucle temporal.

footer.en: Teacher mode: project this screen and guide team discussion.
footer.es: Modo profesor: proyecta esta pantalla y guia la discusion del equipo.

setupDescription.en: Enter the names of all participants. Turns will rotate automatically.
setupDescription.es: Ingresa los nombres de todos los participantes. Los turnos rotaran automaticamente.

setupError.es: Completa todos los nombres de participantes.

searchFirst.en: Search the room first. You still need the hidden clue.
searchFirst.es: Primero explora la sala. Aun necesitas la pista oculta.

incorrect.en: Incorrect. Turn passes to the next participant.
incorrect.es: Incorrecto. El turno pasa al siguiente participante.

completedDescription.en: The Time Core is stable. Your team saved Chrono Academy.
completedDescription.es: El Nucleo del Tiempo esta estable. Tu equipo salvo la Academia Chrono.

readBridgeFirst.en: Read the scene prelude first to unlock this challenge.
readBridgeFirst.es: Lee primero el preludio de la escena para desbloquear este desafio.

setupIntroLines.en: A group of adventurous students stayed after class to organize the old Chrono Academy archive. Suddenly, the lights flickered, alarms echoed, and every exit sealed shut.
setupIntroLines.es: Un grupo de estudiantes aventureros se quedo despues de clases para organizar el antiguo archivo de la Academia Chrono. De pronto, las luces parpadearon, sonaron alarmas y todas las salidas se sellaron.

setupIntroLines.en: A hidden system announced that the Time Core had fractured into scattered fragments. If the fragments are not recovered, the school will repeat the same hour forever.
setupIntroLines.es: Un sistema oculto anuncio que el Nucleo del Tiempo se habia fracturado en fragmentos dispersos. Si no se recuperan, la escuela repetira la misma hora para siempre.

setupIntroLines.en: Your team must explore each room, decode clues, and solve language challenges. Every participant will lead at key moments. Focus, collaborate, and begin the escape.
setupIntroLines.es: Tu equipo debe explorar cada sala, decodificar pistas y resolver desafios de lenguaje. Cada participante liderara en momentos clave. Enfoquense, colaboren y comiencen el escape.

epilogueText.en: As the final lock opens, the Time Core stabilizes and a warm light floods Chrono Academy. The loop dissolves, clocks return to normal, and the corridors fill with life again. Your team did not escape by luck, but by listening, reasoning, and trusting each other in every challenge.
epilogueText.es: Cuando se abre la ultima cerradura, el Nucleo del Tiempo se estabiliza y una luz calida inunda la Academia Chrono. El bucle se disuelve, los relojes vuelven a la normalidad y los pasillos recuperan su vida. Tu equipo no escapo por suerte, sino por escuchar, razonar y confiar entre ustedes en cada desafio.

description.en: A locked cabinet guards the first fragment of the Time Core.
description.es: Un gabinete cerrado protege el primer fragmento del Nucleo del Tiempo.

objective.en: Choose the correct tense to unlock the cabinet.
objective.es: Elige el tiempo verbal correcto para abrir el gabinete.

question.en: Yesterday, the principal ____ the emergency protocol.
question.es: Ayer, el director ____ el protocolo de emergencia.

options.en: activate
activated
activates
is activating

hints.en: Look at the time marker: yesterday.
hints.es: Observa el marcador temporal: ayer.

hints.en: Use simple past.
hints.es: Usa pasado simple.

bridgeLines.en: The team enters the Archive Hall, where ticking clocks sound louder than usual.
bridgeLines.es: El equipo entra a la Sala de Archivos, donde los relojes suenan mas fuerte de lo normal.

bridgeLines.en: A locked cabinet vibrates softly. The first fragment is close, but grammar is the key.
bridgeLines.es: Un gabinete cerrado vibra suavemente. El primer fragmento esta cerca, pero la gramatica es la llave.

bridgeLines.en: A broken dialogue hangs in the air. Completing it correctly restores the channel.

description.en: The tunnel loops every 30 seconds unless you decode the signal.

title.es: Escena 8: Portal del Nucleo del Tiempo

description.en: Final lock: one logic sentence stands between the team and freedom.
description.es: Bloqueo final: una oracion logica separa al equipo de la libertad.

objective.en: Select the sentence with correct word order.
objective.es: Selecciona la oracion con orden correcto de palabras.

question.en: Choose the correct sentence.
question.es: Elige la oracion correcta.

options.en: Always we check the clues carefully.
options.es: Always we check the clues carefully.

options.en: We always check the clues carefully.
options.es: We always check the clues carefully.

options.en: We check always carefully the clues.
options.es: We check always carefully the clues.

options.en: Check we always the clues carefully.
options.es: Check we always the clues carefully.

hints.en: Adverb of frequency usually goes before the main verb.
hints.es: El adverbio de frecuencia suele ir antes del verbo principal.

bridgeLines.en: At last, the team stands before the Time Core Gate, glowing with unstable energy.
bridgeLines.es: Por fin, el equipo se encuentra ante el Portal del Nucleo del Tiempo, brillando con energia inestable.

bridgeLines.en: One final sentence will decide everything: freedom or another endless hour.
bridgeLines.es: Una ultima oracion lo decide todo: libertad u otra hora interminable.

objective.en: Select the sentence with correct word order.
objective.es: Selecciona la oracion con orden correcto de palabras.

question.en: Choose the correct sentence.
question.es: Elige la oracion correcta.

options.en: Always we check the clues carefully.
options.es: Always we check the clues carefully.

options.en: We always check the clues carefully.
options.es: We always check the clues carefully.

options.en: We check always carefully the clues.
options.es: We check always carefully the clues.

options.en: Check we always the clues carefully.
options.es: Check we always the clues carefully.

hints.en: Adverb of frequency usually goes before the main verb.
hints.es: El adverbio de frecuencia suele ir antes del verbo principal.

objective.en: Unlock the gate with advanced connector logic.
objective.es: Desbloquea el portal con logica avanzada de conectores.

question.en: Choose the sentence with correct connector punctuation and order.
question.es: Elige la oracion con conectores y puntuacion correctos.

options.en: Although the signal was weak, we decoded the message.
options.es: Although the signal was weak, we decoded the message.

options.en: Although was weak the signal, we decoded the message.
options.es: Although was weak the signal, we decoded the message.

options.en: Although the signal was weak we decoded, the message.
options.es: Although the signal was weak we decoded, the message.

options.en: Although the signal weak was, we decoded message the.
options.es: Although the signal weak was, we decoded message the.

hints.en: Subordinate clause needs normal subject-verb order.
hints.es: La subordinada necesita orden normal sujeto-verbo.

hints.en: Only one option keeps punctuation coherent.
hints.es: Solo una opcion mantiene puntuacion coherente.

objective.en: Solve final syntax lock using reduced relative structure.
objective.es: Resuelve el bloqueo sintactico final usando relativa reducida.

question.en: Select the grammatically correct reduced relative sentence.
question.es: Selecciona la oracion correcta con relativa reducida.

options.en: Students completing the protocol may enter the core room.
options.es: Students completing the protocol may enter the core room.

options.en: Students complete the protocol may entering the core room.
options.es: Students complete the protocol may entering the core room.

options.en: Students completed the protocol may enter the core rooming.
options.es: Students completed the protocol may enter the core rooming.

options.en: Students who completing the protocol may enter the core room.
options.es: Students who completing the protocol may enter the core room.

hints.en: Reduced relative = noun + present participle phrase.
hints.es: Relativa reducida = sustantivo + frase con participio presente.

hints.en: Avoid malformed auxiliary patterns.
hints.es: Evita patrones auxiliares mal formados.
